title: The Lunacorns
description: Join Princess Self-Respectra and the Lunacorns and learn all about the wonders of imagination, good citizenship, and proper grooming!
quote: To get to Raincloud City, I’ll need my magic hairbrush!
alt1: Princess Self-Respectra surrounded by objects with eyes: a robot, a dresser, a book, and a crayon
alt4: closeup of the dresser with one of its drawers open
